item.building-totem.building_totem.toolt: The first to reach the top of the Oriental Pearl Tower is the worker!
item.building-totem.creeper_totem.toolti: Self-destruct! This is just a "pig"'s great revenge
item.building-totem.heal_totem.tooltip: Fully restores health on death, grants extra golden hearts and regeneration. A healer cannot heal themselves!
item.building-totem.teleport_totem.toolt: Right-click a block to set a teleport point, return here on death
item.building-totem.supreme_totem.toolti: 30 seconds of absolute power. Reign supreme!!
item.building-totem.lightning_totem.tool: Summons thunder on death, strikes nearby monsters every 2 sec for 30 sec
item.building-totem.gamble_totem.tooltip: Upon death: 50% chance to gain a powerful buff, 50% chance to summon a hostile creature (there's an easter egg, hehe).
item.building-totem.tiandi_totem.tooltip: Creates a devastating explosion on death, grants invincibility
item.building-totem.void_totem.tooltip: Begs the mercy of the void when falling, teleports you back to safety
item.building-totem.apocalypse_sword.too: Judgment Day has arrived, one hit kill
advancement.building-totem.root.title: Totem Expansion Craft
advancement.building-totem.first_totem_u: Use a totem for the first time
